content.content: Cuban-American actor, social media influencer, and political activist. He is best known as the host of the web show Hola Ota-Ola!, an informative program that covers entertainment, news and politics. He studied at a special athletic school in Cuba known as ESPA where he trained in water polo, horse riding and chess. He also did gymnastics and musical aerobics. In 2023, he registered his candidacy to run in the Miami-Dade mayoral elections. He posts a variety of content from his daily life on his alexanderotaola Instagram page. He was born in Camagüey, Cuba. On December 3, 2003, he emigrated to the United States from Cuba on a Visa. He portrayed the character Carlos Recto in the MEGATV show Esta Noche Tu Night hosted byAlexis Valdés.
